bits.premise: Fatherlessness was so normal in his neighborhood that kids mocked classmates who had dads.
Being raised by a single mother meant spending Saturdays at Lane Bryant.
His religious upbringing made him ashamed when puberty gave him breasts.
He expects applause for saying some women like bigger men and turns the silence on the crowd.

lines.text: - My dad was in and out of my life,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: but that was pretty normal in my neighborhood, y'all.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: It was so bad at my elementary school
lines.label: setup

lines.text: that if you had a dad, we would make fun of you.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Oh, yo, dad took you to Disneyland?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: "Ha ha, you must be gay."
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Out there sucking on Disney dick.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: You know what was pretty gay?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Being raised by a single mother.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Every Saturday I had to go shopping with her at Lane Bryant.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: If you don't know what that is,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: that's a Vittoria secret for big bitches.

lines.text: I love my mom though, but she raised me super religious.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Like so religious, like to the point I used to feel shame
lines.label: setup

lines.text: about certain things when I was becoming a man.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: For example, the first time I seen titties, I cried.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I was looking in the mirror like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: yo, those not supposed to be there.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Like, why God, why?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: And I know I'm a bigger guy,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: but there are some women out there that like bigger men.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Fuck y'all, Austin.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I was waiting for a fucking standing ovation, God damn it.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Thank you. I've been Isaiah Washington
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: from Fresno, California.
